key_themes: Management fee cut from 0.22% to 0.17% in late 2025, making it best-in-class
Strong performance (~20.45% in 2025, ~15% annualized since 2019 inception, positive YTD and 1-year returns)
Simple 100% global equity diversification with Canadian home bias, ideal for set-it-and-forget-it investors
Strong adoption in Canadian communities (r/justbuyveqt >5,500 members) with DCA during dips encouraged
Positive expert reviews praising low costs, Vanguard structure, and long-term compounding vs. peers like XEQT
summary: VEQT maintains strongly positive sentiment among Canadian investors as a low-cost, globally diversified all-equity ETF. Vanguard's November 2025 fee reduction to 0.17% combined with solid 2025 returns (~20.45%, matching XEQT) and strong long-term performance (~15% annualized since 2019) have reinforced its status as a core buy-and-hold choice. Dedicated communities continue promoting consistent contributions through volatility, with expert reviews highlighting its efficiency and compounding power despite equity market swings.[[1]](https://milliondollarjourney.com/veqt-etf-review.htm)[[2]](https://canadianportfoliomanagerblog.com/2025-all-equity-etf-returns/)[[1]](https://milliondollarjourney.com/veqt-etf-review.htm)
sources: 15+ relevant recent X posts (Latest and semantic search since late 2025), 12+ news articles, ETF reviews, and performance reports (2025-2026), Multiple active Reddit threads (r/justbuyveqt, r/CanadianInvestor, r/fican)
